languages.text: "Соломон, действуем по твоему плану, займись организацией обороны и ударных групп".

traits.locale_text: "Соломон, действуем по твоему плану, займись организацией обороны и ударных групп".

languages.text: "Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."
languages.original_text: "Соломон, действуем по твоему плану, займись организацией обороны и ударных групп".

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."
"Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."
"Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."
"Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."
"Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."

languages.text: 「ソロモーン、ザルコビアンの集落の防衛を組織するのを手伝ってくれ。ダンロック、コロニーに外部からの物資を供給してくれ。この騒ぎが収まるまで待とう」
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, help the Zarkovians to organise the defence of their settlements. Danrok, provide the colony with supplies from the outside. We will wait until this is over."

traits.locale_text: 「ソロモーン、ザルコビアンの集落の防衛を組織するのを手伝ってくれ。ダンロック、コロニーに外部からの物資を供給してくれ。この騒ぎが収まるまで待とう。」

languages.text: «Solomorne, seguiremos su plan. Encárguese de la organización de nuestras defensas y equipos de ataque».
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."

traits.locale_text: «Solomorne, seguiremos su plan. Encárguese de la organización de nuestras defensas y equipos de ataque».

languages.text: “索罗蒙，就按你的计划来。你负责部署防线和突击队。”
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."

traits.locale_text: “索罗蒙，就按你的计划来。你负责部署防线和突击队。”

languages.text: "Solomorne, wir werden Eurem Plan folgen. Organisiert unsere Verteidigung und Eingreifteams."
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, wir werden Eurem Plan folgen. Organisiert unsere Verteidigung und Eingreifteams."

languages.text: "Solomorne, senin planını uygulayacağız. Savunmamızın ve saldırı ekiplerimizin organizasyonuyla ilgilen."
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."

traits.locale_text: "Solomorne, senin planını uygulayacağız. Savunmamızın ve saldırı ekiplerimizin organizasyonuyla ilgilen."

languages.text: « Solomorne, nous allons suivre votre plan. Occupez-vous de l'organisation de nos défenses et des groupes d'assaut. »
languages.original_text: "Solomorne, we'll go with your plan. See to the organization of our defences and strike teams."

traits.locale_text: « Solomorne, nous allons suivre votre plan. Occupez-vous de l'organisation de nos défenses et des groupes d'assaut. »
